text:
clarify, in determining whether the patient meets criterion two of the homebound 
definition, the clinician needs to take into account the illness or injury for which the 
patient met criterion one and consider the illness or injury in the context of the patient’s 
overall condition. The clinician is not required to include standardized phrases reflecting 
the patient’s condition (e.g., repeating the words “taxing effort to leave the home”) in the 
patient’s chart, nor are such phrases
